result.preview:
"Postgres query exectution error (ProgrammingError): (psycopg2.errors.UndefinedColumn) column "patient_description" does not exist
LINE 1: SELECT Patient_description, patient_id, histological_type, t...
               ^
HINT:  Perhaps you meant to reference the column "clinical_info.Patient_description".

[SQL: SELECT Patient_description, patient_id, histological_type, tumor_tissue_site FROM clinical_info WHERE lower(patient_description) LIKE '%%lower grade glioma%%' OR lower(histological_type) LIKE '%%lower grade%%' OR lower(tumor_tissue_site) LIKE '%%brain%%' LIMIT 1000;]
(Background on this error at: https://sqlalche.me/e/20/f405)"

args.query: SELECT Patient_description, patient_id, histological_type, tumor_tissue_site FROM clinical_info WHERE lower(patient_description) LIKE '%lower grade glioma%' OR lower(histological_type) LIKE '%lower grade%' OR lower(tumor_tissue_site) LIKE '%brain%' LIMIT 1000;

exec_args.sql: SELECT Patient_description, patient_id, histological_type, tumor_tissue_site FROM clinical_info WHERE lower(patient_description) LIKE '%lower grade glioma%' OR lower(histological_type) LIKE '%lower grade%' OR lower(tumor_tissue_site) LIKE '%brain%' LIMIT 1000;

args.query: SELECT DISTINCT "histological_type" FROM clinical_info WHERE lower("histological_type") LIKE '%glioma%';
